nasb.text: If the ox gores a male or female slave, the owner shall give his or her master thirty shekels of silver, and the ox shall be stoned.

esv.text: If the ox gores a slave, male or female, the owner shall give to their master thirty shekels of silver, and the ox shall be stoned.

cnv.text: 如果牛觸了人的奴僕，或是婢女，必須把三百四十克銀子給他的主人，那牛也必須用石頭打死。

ccb.text: 牛若抵死了别人的仆婢，牛的主人要赔三百三十克银子给那仆婢的主人，并要用石头打死牛。
